description: Pain Engine security log — suspicious pattern detection, override attempts, and data classification events.

logTypes.SUSPICIOUS_PATTERN: Input matched a known injection or override pattern
logTypes.OVERRIDE_ATTEMPT: Input attempted to override canon, guardrail, or governance
logTypes.SECRET_DETECTED: Credential or secret pattern found in input — redacted, not logged
logTypes.POLICY_CHANGE: Guardrail policy was modified — who, what, when
logTypes.LANE_DISABLE_EVENT: Lane enabled or disabled via auto-control
logTypes.CANON_ACCESS: Canon vault read or write attempt

dataClassificationLevels.public: Safe for external exposure — no restrictions
dataClassificationLevels.internal: Internal Pain System use only — not for client or public output
dataClassificationLevels.sensitive: Contains PII or commercially sensitive data — access restricted
dataClassificationLevels.secret: Credentials, API keys, private keys — never logged, never exposed

entries.message: Security log initialised. Rotation policy set. No entries to report.
